title: melica altissima var. transsilvanica
intro: Melica altissima var. transsilvanica, also known as Transylvanian melic grass, is a perennial grass species in the family Poaceae, native to Eastern Europe. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, making it useful in treating wounds and infections. The health benefits of Melica altissima var. transsilvanica include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and even exhibit antimicrobial properties. Herbal preparations of this plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
